issues.description: Missing condition to limit Rest action to Characters with cost ≤ opponent's Life count. The DSL has no condition filtering by cost relative to opponent's Life cards.
Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' does not appear in official card text. This effect should be removed.
Target should specify 'up to 1' with proper selection constraints based on cost condition, not open-ended ChooseOpponentCharacter.
